# מאור כהן — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Maor Cohen is a personal fitness trainer based in Sderot, Israel, with 3 years of experience and over 100 satisfied clients. His brand is built around luxury fitness aesthetics — dark, bold, and powerful — inspired by leading global fitness brands. The website aims to showcase real before-and-after transformations, build trust and credibility, and convert visitors into leads via WhatsApp. The brand communicates confidence, professionalism, and life-changing results through a premium black and neon green visual identity with smooth animations and a fully RTL Hebrew experience.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://-425ac008.zappy5.app
מאור כהן, מאמן כושר אישי בשדרות עם מעל 100 לקוחות מרוצים. תוכניות אימון אישיות שמביאות תוצאות אמיתיות. צור קשר עכשיו בוואטסאפ ותתחיל את המסע שלך!

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://-425ac008.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://-425ac008.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About מאור כהן
Maor Cohen is a personal fitness trainer based in Sderot, Israel, with 3 years of experience and over 100 satisfied clients. His brand is built around luxury fitness aesthetics — dark, bold, and powerful — inspired by leading global fitness brands. The website aims to showcase real before-and-after transformations, build trust and credibility, and convert visitors into leads via WhatsApp. The brand communicates confidence, professionalism, and life-changing results through a premium black and neon green visual identity with smooth animations and a fully RTL Hebrew experience.

## Target Audience
- אנשים המעוניינים לשפר כושר גופני, לרדת במשקל ולבנות אורח חיים בריא באזור שדרות
- חובבי כושר בשדרות
- מחפשי ירידה במשקל

## Industry
Fitness & Personal Training

---

- Robots: https://-425ac008.zappy5.app/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://-425ac008.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
